title: Reverse Cross-linking Protocol
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"8g7el","text":"To reverse the crosslinking of DNA that results from the PFA fixative, PFA fixed samples were prepared by incubating the cell lysate in 0.5M NaCl for 18 hours at 65°C.
